programme.title: SMP for Pink Blood
programme.desc: A playlist of powerful SM Music Performance tracks.

programme.title: WayV '白色定格 (Eternal White)' MV
programme.desc: The title track “白色定格 (Eternal White)” is a dance-pop song that blends a rhythmic saxophone riff with energetic drum beats, creating a warm atmosphere through the harmony of powerful rap and sweet vocals. The lyrics express a strong determination to break free from time frozen like a white winter and to keep moving forward, capturing the hearts of listeners..

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Promise' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics, written by DOYOUNG, capture the feelings he couldn't easily express as his love grew deeper. Even if the confession comes late, it delivers a sincerity and emotional resonance stronger than any other words.The title track “Promise” is an impressive ballad that begins with a minimal piano melody and gradually builds emotional depth as strings are added in the latter half.

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)' Live Clip
programme.desc: With Belle participating as a featuring artist and harmonizing with DOYOUNG, the synergy between the two elevates the charm of the song even further.The track “Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)” is an R&B ballad that depicts a moment of exchanging feelings through the sound of a whistle. Layered over a jazz guitar melody, the sweet vocals blend together like a conversation, conveying a lovely sense of fluttering excitement.

programme.title: EXO 'REVERXE' Trailer
programme.desc: At the end of the trailer, the title of EXO's 8th full-length album, “REVERXE,” was finally revealed. Based on EXO's universe storyline — “the day we truly become one, a new world will open” — the album name reinterprets the word “Reverse” in EXO's own style, carrying the meaning “a new world opens once again,” further heightening anticipation.EXO has returned with a new trailer.

programme.title: EXO 'I'm Home' MV
programme.desc: “I'm Home” is a pop ballad that blends delicate piano melodies with lush strings, expressing the happiness of being reunited with loved ones and the wish to stay in this moment for a long time.EXO has hinted at a new winter song that follows the emotional resonance of the chart resurgence of “First Snow.”

programme.title: MINHO 민호 'TEMPO' MV
programme.desc: The title track “TEMPO” is a dance song that creates a cool vibe with its groovy 808 bass and a variety of rhythmic instruments. The lyrics convey the message of approaching the other person at the pace they desire. In addition, the performance is designed with bold, dynamic movements that highlight MINHO's distinctive physique, along with choreography that matches the song's groovy mood. The latter part of the performance, featuring impressive synergy with the dancers, is expected to deliver an energetic atmosphere that everyone can enjoy together.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.” The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy.

programme.title: Mystic Amusement
programme.desc: Step into a world of wonder with music videos that feel like a theme park — dazzling, dreamy, and full of magic.

programme.title: EXO by EXO
programme.desc: A collection of songs crafted and written by EXO members, where their personal messages and artistic vision come to life.

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: I'm LIVE presents the Music & Lyrics Special in celebration of its 4th anniversary! And the second guest of the special trilogy is singer-songwriter JEONGMILLA. JEONGMILLA is known for her delicate poetic depictions of everyday life combined with heartwarming folk sounds. Interestingly enough she started off her career through fine arts after graduating from the prestigious Korea National University of Arts. And she says music and art are both important to her in different ways. In October last year JEONGMILLA released her third full-length album CheongPa Sonata. Inspired by the neighborhood she lives in Cheongpa-dong she delicately painted the quotidian scenes of the area with her personal stories. Since its release the album has been highly recommended by critics on various music charts and with this album she won three trophies at the 2021 Korean Music Awards -- Best Song - Folk Best Album - Folk and Best Album of the Year. In this episode JEONGMILLA performs Stars Departing from Seoul Station Old Town Journal During Troubled Times and Wandering. Tune in to I'm LIVE and explore her poetic artistic world!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: I'm LIVE presents the Music & Lyrics Special in celebration of its 4th anniversary! And the last guest of the special trilogy is the super-talented sibling duo AKMU. The two burst into the K-pop scene in 2013 through the competition program K-Pop Star Season 2 and pleasantly surprised the public with their unrefined pure musicality. After being crowned the winners of the season they made their official debut in 2014 with the album PLAY. The elder brother LEE CHANHYUK is known for his exceptional songwriting skills and the younger sister LEE SUHYUN is famous for her crystal clear voice and together they exude a great synergy that makes them one-of-a-kind in the highly competitive K-pop scene. Then in 2015 the duo won the Best Pop Album at the prestigious Korean Music Awards and once again proved that they enjoy both critical acclaim and commercial appeal. They are on the 7th year of their debut and still touch listeners with their creative interpretations of everyday life stories. In this episode AKMU performs ALIEN DINOSAUR How Can I Love The Heartbreak You're The One I Love LAST GOODBYE and GIVE LOVE to showcase the lyrical beauty of their music. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet these two talented siblings!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is the band SORAN! SORAN is one of Korea's top-notch bands composed of vocalist Ko Young-bae bassist Seo Myeon-ho guitarist Lee Tae-wook and drummer Pyeon Yu-il. Unlike what their band name means disturbance in English they offer lively poppy tunes that are relaxing and pleasing to the ears and have gained a steady following in the indie scene since their debut in 2009. Also known for their warm-hearted lyrics and their flawless performances the quartet never fails to get listeners in a good mood. Recently the four dropped their new mini-album Beloved and also held a free online concert titled Perfect Day 0 : Light Steps via YouTube providing a moment of refreshment to everyone around the world. In this episode SORAN performs Be with me the lead single from their new release Don't Lose Weight Ricotta Cheese Salad Confession Of Love and Our Journey. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet these four outstanding musicians!

programme.title: Spoolin' Up With the DeBertis: Mini Bike Mania
programme.desc: Madera is a master builder of minibikes, and brings in enough bikes to stage a race for shop glory Brad has a vision for a hilarious social media video and hits the streets of Pismo with the crew and their 1961 van.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Monster Jump Live
programme.desc: The Diesel Brothers salute the U.S. military with a night of stunts Heavy D hopes to make history by jumping the Brodozer over a flying airplane, while others attempt stunts of their own includes a preview of "Dirty Mudder Truckers."

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: Since the 1970's, sea lion populations have declined more than 80% along the North Pacific coast. Scientists at the University of British Columbia and the Vancouver Aquarium are working together to help save Canada's iconic and largest pinniped – the stellar sea lion

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Shark Gordon's off to the Sea of Cortez to after his next quarry. Dive in and see the wonder of an underwater mountain as Gordon and his crew scour it for the elusive schools of hammerheads.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: A diverse group of distantly related families and species sharing a few common traits, marine invertebrates include polyps, octopus and jellyfish.

programme.title: Safari Flix
programme.desc: Safari Flix is hosted by an experienced ranger/guide who provides compelling in-the-moment narration on the action as it happens. Not only will viewers marvel at the incredible wildlife sightings featured in the show, but so too will they be exposed to a wealth of information on the animals in particular and the African bush and pressing environmental matters in general.

programme.title: Snake Master
programme.desc: Renowned herpetologist Nirut Chomngam takes viewers on a wild journey across the country in an unforgettable adventure filled with deadly encounters, as he joins conservation teams tasked with protecting these astonishing creatures and their jungle home.

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: “Shark Business” unravels some of the mysteries surrounding sharks with controversial behaviorist Dr. Erich Ritter. You'll witness divers testing the limits of shark-human interaction outside of cages with dangerous sharks such as lemon, bull and even great white sharks!

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Ian Gordon has been called upon to handle the delicate matter of moving an adult ragged tooth shark from one aquarium to another.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: Explore the family dynamic of wildebeests, elephants, and giraffes as we take a trip around Africa.

programme.title: Safari Flix
programme.desc: Safari Flix is hosted by an experienced ranger/guide who provides compelling in-the-moment narration on the action as it happens. Not only will viewers marvel at the incredible wildlife sightings featured in the show, but so too will they be exposed to a wealth of information on the animals in particular and the African bush and pressing environmental matters in general.

programme.title: Area 51 Plane Crash – We Found It!
programme.desc: Mark explores a remote crash site in the desert rumored to be tied to Area 51. What he finds is strange, twisted, and possibly historic.Man O' War jellyfish are not true jellyfish—but they're still deadly. Mark gets stung and showcases their long, venomous tentacles.

programme.title: Zombie Toads Rise from the Desert!
programme.desc: Zombie toads rise! Mark uncovers a strange desert phenomenon that brings seemingly dead amphibians back to life after heavy rains.Killer bees aren't just a legend. Coyote cracks open a hive to show how aggressive—and fascinating—these insects really are.

programme.title: Camera Trap Catches Rare Animal!
programme.desc: Coyote sets up a hidden camera trap and captures never-before-seen animal behavior in the wild. The footage is stunning and unexpected.One of Mark's most anticipated stings—the warrior wasp! With a pain rating system in place, he breaks down exactly how intense it is.

programme.title: Stung by an Electric Caterpillar!
programme.desc: This episode features a painful sting from the electric caterpillar, a bizarre jungle dweller with venomous barbs. It's shocking—literally.A sting from Japan's meanest wasp! This aggressive insect doesn't hold back. Mark's reaction is both painful and fascinating.

programme.title: Human Blood vs. Snake Venom!
programme.desc: Coyote tests what happens when human blood encounters snake venom in a controlled, educational experiment. He breaks down the biology, effects, and fascinating science behind venom.

programme.title: Top 13 Most Painful Insect Stings Coyote Peterson Has Ever Taken!
programme.desc: Coyote ranks the top 13 most painful insect stings he's ever taken. From bullet ants to wasps, it's a countdown filled with pain and science. From sand to sea, Coyote builds a mini mudflat aquarium packed with bizarre marine creatures. It's a deep dive into ocean ecology.

programme.title: Exploring Most Haunted House in America!
programme.desc: Spooky vibes abound as Coyote explores one of America's most haunted houses. What's real? What's legend? Only one way to find out. Pain is part of the job, but this one really hurts. Coyote's wild encounter leads to a cringeworthy injury and a valuable field lesson.

programme.title: Venomous Sewer Snake Found in Bangkok!
programme.desc: Urban exploration gets wild when Mark finds a rare venomous snake deep in the sewer systems of Bangkok.This insect doesn't bite—it sprays acid! Mark discovers a rare bug with an unbelievable defense mechanism aimed right at the eyes.

programme.title: Poison Ivy Smoothie – Big Mistake!
programme.desc: Coyote blends poison ivy into a smoothie to test a myth. Spoiler: bad idea. This wild episode mixes humor with a powerful message about plant toxicity.Roaches take over—literally. Coyote faces a nightmare infestation right on his head, exploring how these pests behave and thrive in close quarters.

programme.title: Ultimate Frog Scavenger Hunt!
programme.desc: Can Coyote catch every frog species in one day? This amphibian-packed episode follows a wild scavenger hunt in a lush ecosystem.A tiny puppy is covered in ticks. Coyote and team work quickly to remove them and explain the dangers of tick-borne illnesses.

programme.title: Frog Scavenger Hunt! – Can I Catch Them All?
programme.desc: How many frog species can Coyote catch in one day? This scavenger hunt is a race against time and terrain across wetlands and forests.Costa Rica's most dangerous pit viper is milked for venom in this nerve-racking episode. Coyote shows the precision it takes to stay safe.

programme.title: We Found Rare T‑Rex Teeth!
programme.desc: Coyote uncovers T-Rex teeth during a fossil hunt. Rare, real, and awe-inspiring, this one's for the dino lovers.

programme.title: Bitten by a Giant Bloodworm!
programme.desc: A second sighting of the rare blue frog leaves Coyote stunned. The frog's vibrant coloration is even more incredible up close.Giant bloodworms have jaws and venom, and they're not shy about using either. Mark finds out the hard way.

programme.desc: It's time for Molly Yeh's baby shower and there's quite a crowd to feed Molly keeps it simple-but-delicious with her potato, sausage and broccoli frittata and herby salad with burrata.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly treats her girlfriends to a twist on taco night her menu includes taco pizza al pastor with tomatillo salsa and avocado cucumber salad served alongside watermelon agua fresca she finishes off the night with chocolate-covered ice cream tacos.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's mom comes to the farm to share a few family recipes before baby arrives Molly makes pastrami eggrolls as a tribute to her mother's hometown to go with citrus chicken rice bowls and grilled veggies.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making the coziest foods imaginable spiced beef hot dish with bacon jalapeno cornbread loaded potato skins for dessert, dreamy Tahini fudge pie.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly is hosting a Mexican themed brunch for the Spicy Senoritas of the Grand Forks Brunch Club churro pancakes with sweet milk glaze chorizo, egg and cheese enchiladas charred tomatillo salad spicy palomas.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making a garden-themed party for her little girl juicy pretzel-crusted chicken nugget salad tomato and mozzarella tart creamy beet ricotta dip rainbow cake with Marzipan vegetables and a mini smash cake for the birthday queen.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is baking tasty treats for the farmers thick and soft sugar beet sugar cookies pumpkin cranberry loaf flakey pepperoni pizza pastries and adorable cookie-coated chocolate strawberries that look like mini beets they're harvesting.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh hosts a double-date pizza party on the farm and takes the Italian grilling outside she makes cheesy fried risotto balls, grilled zucchini pizza with basil mint pesto and a crisp Romaine salad drizzled in bacon fat vinaigrette.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making a Mexican food vacation for her husband, Nick, with all his favorites she cooks up a decadent refried beans and rice bowl, roasted salmon tacos in flour tortillas and creamy coconut-lime tres leches cake.

programme.title: Midnight Misadventures With Mallika Dua
programme.desc: Shalishka taps into her talents during a game of Ultimate Music Champion with artist Vishal Dadlani. They later make deviled eggs with noodle salad.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is putting her own spin on some of her favorite dishes to make a fun meal for Nick and her dad the menu includes Molly's Chicago Dog Meatloaf with Mustard Glaze, a Salt-and-Vinegar Potato Galette and more.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is preparing make-ahead meals in anticipation of the birth of her first child there's a freezer-friendly version of sweet potato and black bean burritos, mini spinach and artichoke chicken casseroles and potato bagel breakfast sandwiches.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes a delicious farm spread to celebrate the arrival of spring with her family she's making homemade herbed pasta with feta, lemon and pine nuts, hearty meatballs with garlic yogurt and chimichurri and more.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: It's time for Molly Yeh's baby shower and there's quite a crowd to feed Molly keeps it simple-but-delicious with her potato, sausage and broccoli frittata and herby salad with burrata.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly treats her girlfriends to a twist on taco night her menu includes taco pizza al pastor with tomatillo salsa and avocado cucumber salad served alongside watermelon agua fresca she finishes off the night with chocolate-covered ice cream tacos.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini highlights the tiny region of Molise, exposing some of its best kept savoury secrets. Starting with a classic, Michael cooks up a delicious multi-layered Chicory Timbale, a pie filled with fresh chicory, ripe roma tomatoes, and sliced prosciutto. To crisp up the top of the pie, Michael tops his delicious dish with finely grated pecorino cheese and crunchy breadcrumbs. Next up, Michael's primo is a spicy Octopus in Purgatory. This tender, colourful, and sumptuous dish is sure to impress in both looks and taste! For his secondo, Michael cooks up a traditional Marinated Rabbit. Stewed in wine, tomatoes, and chilies, this rustic dish will have your guests asking for seconds. To finish, Michael whips up light and luscious Peaches and Cream Cookies. Filled with decadent cream, these round delights are refreshing and lighter-than-air - the perfect way to end a wholesome meal.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Delving into the cold mountainous region of Valle D'Aosta, Celebrity chef Michael Bonacini whips up a meal of four hearty dishes that are sure to warm up any chilly day. First up is Michael's antipasto of Wild Mushrooms and Lardo on Rye. Coated with rich, earthy mushrooms, buttery fontina cheese, and savoury cured pork, this decadent dish highlights a combination of iconic flavours from Valle D'Aosta. Next up is a twist on traditional pasta with Valle D'Aosta's unique Chestnut Fettucine topped with Sweet Pork and Earthy Cabbage. The secret to this dish? Chestnut flour to create a denser, sweeter, and nuttier pasta. For his secondo, Michael turns to the pride of the region, Fontina cheese, to fill his Stuffed Veal Cutlets. Luscious and rich, this dish is a burst of luxurious flavours in every bite. For his final dish, Michael shows his sweet side with a Crema di Cogne served with Valdostana Tile Cookies. The thin, crispy cookies with a hint of hazelnut dipped in a light chocolate cream are the perfect way to wrap up Michael's luxurious Valle D'Aosta meal.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: The popular region of Tuscany is known for its wines, cheeses, and gorgeous sights. Chef Michael Bonacini introduces us to Tuscany's fine cuisine with four of his favourite dishes. Michael draws attention to the importance of mushrooms in Tuscan culture with an antipasto: Many Mushroom soup. Warm, hearty, and full of earthy flavour, Michael tops this soup with fried sage leaves to combine comfort and crunch in a single bite. For his primo, Michael explores a Tuscan favourite - Lamb Ragu! Served over pici noodles, Michael's rich ragu is complemented by fresh, light herbs. Then, Michael serves up a Porchetta-Style Duck, a crispy and tender secondo. To bring his meal together, Michael ends with a smooth and decadent Creamy Coffee Custard any coffee fan will appreciate.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: From hearty inland crops to fresh food of the sea, the Venetian region covers it all. Host Michael Bonacini begins with the sea as he serves up an antipasto of succulent Soft Shell Crab. Michael pairs the crab with a Tangy Aioli made from sundried tomatoes, creating the perfect combination of crispy and creamy. Moving inland for his primo, Michael twists together two classic Venetian dishes to make a new favourite: Radicchio Risotto! With his secondo, Michael cooks up a light and creamy Pancetta-Wrapper Snapper with Pea Mash. Sweet and tender, this dish will melt in your mouth. Whether you're in the mood to share or feeling a little selfish, Michael's Giant Almond Crumb Biscuit covers it all. Buttery, sweet, and satisfyingly crumbly, this biscuit is sure to lead to a memorable dinner!

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Puglia's lush landscape and large coastline characterize its cuisine. Chef Michael Bonacini explores its native ingredients through some of Puglia's favourite meals. First up, Michael's antipasto is a guaranteed crunchy bite with crispy Fried Mussels. Stepping away from the sea, Michael highlights Puglia's prize crop: tomatoes! Combining colourful tomatoes with flavourful burrata cheese, Michael cooks up comfort in a bowl with his Tomato and Burrata Risotto. Taking on a more festive flair, Michael introduces us to Little Pork Bombs, the hottest street food in Puglia. With a filling of fresh herbs and melted cheese, these pork skewers are savoury and irresistible. Then, Michael introduces a classic Father's Day dessert for his dulce: Sour Cherry-on-Top Fritters. A dessert for strolling the street, Michal's crispy golden fritters topped with light mascarpone whipped cream will have you whipping them up at home as well!

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Simplicity is key with Sicilian cuisine and Chef Michael Bonacini explores just how the region balances simplicity with intensity through four flavourful dishes. Starting with an antipasto of Folded Flatbread with Ricotta and Fennel Seeds, Michael inspires with its intricate beauty with a simple recipe. Keeping to the theme of simplicity, Michael shows that plenty of flavour can come from little ingredients in his primo of Broccoli and Sausage Rigatoni. The spicy sausage and chili is countered by a creamy broccoli pesto for a dish that highlights Sicilian cuisine. Michael turns to the Italian queen of crops for his secondo: Eggplant Parmesan Roll-Ups. With thin slices of eggplant rolled up to contain a mouth-watering mixture of mozzarella, provolone, and pecorino romano, this dish gets an extra kick of flavour from a coating of breadcrumbs and tomato sauce. To bring it all together, Michael combines spicy with sweet through his tender Spiced Chocolate Cookies.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Filled with ruins in its bustling streets, the region of Lazio sticks with grandeur in all it does, including food! To introduce us to Lazio, Host Michael Bonacini highlights its Jewish influence with a crispy Roman Jewish-style Artichokes. As crunchy as a potato chip, Michael's artichokes are a delicious fried treat that are a perfect way to kick off a delicious meal. For his primo Michael brings together simple ingredients to create a rich Bucatini with Amatriciana Sauce. Michael's secondo turns what was once peasant food into a delectable and tender dish. Cooked with a blend of vegetables and sauce, Michael's Braised Oxtail brings forth the history of cuisine. Returning to Rome for his final dish, Michael cooks up the popular Sour Cherry and Ricotta Tart. With the tart cherries countered by the creamy ricotta, every decadent bite offers a world of taste.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Campania's beautiful coastline is filled with two things: tourists and seafood. Diving into the culture of the region, Celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini begins his meal with a salad from the Island of Capri. Putting a twist on the classic dish, Michael's Grilled Caprese Salad combines fresh tomatoes, tangy balsamic, and a hint of sweetness from basil. For his primo, Michael serves up bold flavours with his Spaghetti Puttanesca. Mixing salty and sweet, this sauce offers a delicious take on the typical plate of spaghetti. Looking to the coast for his secondo, Michael quickly cooks up aromatic and spicy Herb-stuffed Scallops and Grilled Broccoli Rabe. For his dolce Michael whips up a dessert made for a celebration: Rum Babas. Typically for special occasions, each bite of Rum Babas offers pure sweetness with a fresh citrus zest.

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: This week, Melvyn stops over in Hanoi, Vietnam. The capital of the nation, Hanoi boasts more than 1000 years of history. Along with that, comes a long-standing history of traditional cuisine with many famous delicacies. Melvyn visits a Vietnamese rice farmer, where he experiences a typical Vietnamese home cooking. Then he hangs out with a culinary artisan who has been living in the city for many generations and learns what it takes to cook an authentic Hanoi cuisine.
